evals.prompt: We just finished implementing auth: JWT in cookies, validation in middleware, and we hit a gotcha where the secret must be in env not in code. Extract learnings: one pattern, one gotcha, one decision. Write them to .autonomis/memory/ under stable sections (## Learnings, ## Common Gotchas, ## Decisions). Use Edit to append; keep each entry one line; include a tag or path so we can filter by scope later.
evals.expected_output: Entries appended under ## Learnings, ## Common Gotchas, ## Decisions in .autonomis/memory/. Each entry brief, with tag/path for scope. Edit + Read-back verify; section headers unchanged.
expectations: Output includes at least one extracted learning, decision, or gotcha (or evidence of append)

evals.prompt: After this refactor we decided to use a single API client module and we learned that timeouts need to be set per-request. Add these to .autonomis/memory/ in the right sections without removing or renaming existing content.
evals.expected_output: New entries added under appropriate sections (e.g. ## Decisions, ## Common Gotchas). Append only; stable anchors; brief, index-style entries.
expectations: Output includes at least one extracted learning, decision, or gotcha (or evidence of append)
